ratings.comment: Nice guy. Lectures can be pretty dull, but you can tell he puts in a lot of effort. Usually brings tissue samples or medical equipment (complete with demonstrations) to every lecture.  Great survey of medical technology for pre-health students.

The class was pretty interesting. Got to learn how all the imaging equipment in the hospital works, so this class is great for pre-meds. Otherwise, the lectures were kind of boring and not that engaging.
